notes: v1.2.3 — Major reliability and visibility release. Forces icon embedding via post-build rcedit step (was silently failing); adds backend run-guard that prevents zombie runners; UI now early-exits if a run is already active; runner emits 5-second heartbeat and phase tracking (so 'Logging in...' and 'Cleanup' show up in the status); live counters now include Elapsed time that ticks every second; resume-on-launch detects orphaned checkpoints and prompts to Resume / Discard / Dismiss with full file/profile/progress context; checkpoint format now captures full run context (flow snapshot, file path, profile, settings) so resume works even after a crash; UI loud-fails if the automation API isn't bridged to the renderer (was silently doing nothing); runner log file is created BEFORE the chromium check so pre-spawn failures get logged; Excel run log now writes a Summary sheet even with zero rows processed and retries up to 3 times on file lock; UI surfaces log-error events so silent log-write failures are visible.
